story.iWant: Recipe to parse Capture One .costyle preset files and extract all adjustment parameters
story.soThat: I can convert my Capture One styles to other formats (XMP, lrtemplate, NP3) and use them across different editing software
story.tasks:
### Task 1: Create Package Structure (AC: All) - [ ] Create internal/formats/costyle/ directory - [ ] Create types.go - Define Go structs matching .costyle XML schema - [ ] Create parse.go - Implement Parse(data []byte) function - [ ] Create parse_test.go - Unit tests for parsing - [ ] Create testdata/ directory for sample .costyle files
### Task 2: Define .costyle XML Data Structures (AC-1) - [ ] Define CaptureOneStyle struct with xml tags (XMLName xml.Name, RDF RDF) - [ ] Define RDF struct with Description element - [ ] Define Description struct with adjustment fields: Exposure, Contrast, Saturation, Temperature, Tint, Clarity, ColorBalance fields - [ ] Add XML namespace constants (if required by .costyle format)
### Task 3: Implement Parse() Function (AC-1, AC-2) - [ ] Implement Parse(data []byte) (*universal.Recipe, error) function signature - [ ] Unmarshal XML using encoding/xml.Unmarshal(data, &style) - [ ] Handle XML unmarshal errors (malformed XML) - [ ] Map parsed .costyle fields to UniversalRecipe with correct scaling - [ ] Handle missing fields (set to zero values) - [ ] Clamp out-of-range values to valid ranges - [ ] Populate recipe.Metadata map with style name/author if present - [ ] Return populated *universal.Recipe and nil error on success
### Task 4: Implement Error Handling (AC-3) - [ ] Wrap XML unmarshal errors with descriptive messages - [ ] Validate required XML elements exist (Description, RDF) - [ ] Report specific errors for invalid parameter values - [ ] Add helper function clampFloat64(value, min, max float64) float64 - [ ] Add helper function clampInt(value, min, max int) int - [ ] Test error paths with malformed XML samples
### Task 5: Write Unit Tests (AC-4) - [ ] Acquire/create 3+ real .costyle sample files - [ ] Add samples to testdata/costyle/ directory - [ ] Write TestParse_ValidFile() - Test with valid .costyle file - [ ] Write TestParse_MinimalFile() - Test with minimal valid .costyle - [ ] Write TestParse_MalformedXML() - Test with invalid XML - [ ] Write TestParse_MissingElements() - Test with missing Description element - [ ] Write TestParse_OutOfRangeValues() - Test with out-of-range parameter values - [ ] Run tests: go test ./internal/formats/costyle/ - [ ] Verify coverage: go test -cover ./internal/formats/costyle/ (target ≥85%)
### Task 6: Documentation (AC-1, AC-2, AC-3) - [ ] Add package comment in parse.go - [ ] Add function comment for Parse() - [ ] Add README in testdata/costyle/ documenting sample sources - [ ] Update docs/parameter-mapping.md with .costyle parameter mappings

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
**AC-1: Parse Capture One .costyle XML Structure** - Parse XML structure per Capture One style specification - Extract core adjustments: exposure, contrast, saturation, temperature, tint, clarity - Extract color balance adjustments: shadows, midtones, highlights (hue/saturation) - Handle missing/optional parameters gracefully (use zero values) - Validate XML structure and report parsing errors with clear messages - Support .costyle format versions in use (2023-2025)
**AC-2: Return UniversalRecipe Representation** - Convert parsed .costyle to *universal.Recipe struct - Map Capture One parameters to UniversalRecipe equivalents with correct scaling - Preserve metadata (style name, author, description if present) - Handle unmappable parameters (store in Metadata map or skip gracefully) - Return populated UniversalRecipe with all supported fields
**AC-3: Handle Parsing Errors** - Validate XML well-formedness (detect corrupt/malformed files) - Report specific parsing errors (line number, element name if possible) - Return descriptive error messages (not generic Go errors) - Handle missing required XML elements gracefully - Handle out-of-range parameter values (clamp to valid range)
**AC-4: Unit Test Coverage** - Unit tests for Parse() function with valid .costyle files - Unit tests for error cases (malformed XML, missing elements, invalid values) - Test with real-world .costyle samples (minimum 3 files) - Test coverage ≥85% for costyle/parse.go - All tests pass in CI

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Capture One Format Support
doc.section: Data Models and Contracts - Capture One .costyle XML Structure
doc.snippet: XML structure with RDF/Description elements. Exposure (-2.0 to +2.0), Contrast/Saturation/Temperature/Tint/Clarity (-100 to +100). Go struct mapping with encoding/xml tags. Parameter scaling formulas documented.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Capture One Format Support
doc.snippet: Parse(data []byte) (*universal.Recipe, error). Uses xml.Unmarshal with struct tags. Returns error if invalid XML or out-of-range parameters. Zero external dependencies (stdlib only).

doc.title: Architecture
doc.section: Pattern 4: File Structure for Format Packages
doc.snippet: Every format package follows identical structure: parse.go, generate.go, {format}_test.go. Parse function signature: Parse([]byte) (*UniversalRecipe, error). Pattern used by np3, xmp, lrtemplate packages.

doc.title: Architecture
doc.snippet: Use fmt.Errorf with %w verb for error wrapping. Include operation context in error messages. No panics - all errors via return value. ConversionError type for type-safe error checking.

doc.title: Architecture
doc.snippet: Validate inline in parsers, fail fast with descriptive errors. Check magic bytes/structure first. Validate parameter ranges during extraction. Return clear error messages with context.

doc.title: Architecture
doc.snippet: Table-driven tests with real sample files. Use filepath.Glob to discover test files. Run subtest for each file. Validate extracted parameters are within expected ranges. Target ≥85% test coverage.

doc.title: Parameter Mapping Reference
doc.section: To be updated with Capture One mappings
doc.snippet: Document Capture One parameter scaling: Contrast/Saturation -100..100 → UniversalRecipe -1.0..1.0. Temperature/Tint mappings. Color balance to shadows/midtones/highlights.

artifact.reason: Reference implementation for XML parsing with encoding/xml. Uses ConversionError type, validateXMLStructure helper, parameter extraction pattern. Same pattern needed for .costyle parsing.
Standard error type used across all format parsers. Provides Operation, Format, Field, Cause fields. Implements Error() and Unwrap(). Should reuse for costyle package.
Table-driven test pattern using filepath.Glob to discover sample files. Runs subtest for each file. Validates SourceFormat and critical field ranges. Template for costyle tests.
Binary parser with fail-fast validation pattern. Shows validateFileStructure → extractParameters → validateParameters → buildRecipe flow. Error wrapping with fmt.Errorf.
Comprehensive test pattern with multiple glob patterns for file discovery. Validates parameter ranges, tests error cases. Shows how to achieve 85%+ coverage.
Central data model for all conversions. Fields for Exposure, Contrast, Saturation, Temperature, Tint, Clarity. Metadata map for format-specific data. Costyle parser populates this struct.
HSL adjustment struct (Hue, Saturation, Luminance). Used for color balance mapping from Capture One shadows/midtones/highlights to UniversalRecipe.
Main conversion engine. Will need to add costyle case to format detection and conversion routing (Story 8-5). Shows integration pattern for new formats.

go.package: XML parsing and unmarshaling. Core dependency for .costyle XML structure parsing.
Error formatting and wrapping with %w verb.
String to numeric conversion for XML attribute parsing.
File path manipulation and glob pattern matching for test file discovery.
File I/O for reading test sample files.

story-context.constraints:
**Architecture Pattern Compliance:** - MUST follow Pattern 4 (File Structure): internal/formats/costyle/ with parse.go, parse_test.go - MUST follow Pattern 5 (Error Handling): Use fmt.Errorf with %w for error wrapping - MUST follow Pattern 6 (Validation Strategy): Fail-fast inline validation - MUST follow Pattern 7 (Testing Strategy): Table-driven tests with real sample files
**Performance Requirements:** - Parse single .costyle file in <100ms (Epic 8 target) - Memory usage <10MB per conversion
**External Dependencies:** - ZERO external dependencies (use Go stdlib only) - Must not require any third-party XML libraries
**Format Compatibility:** - Support Capture One .costyle versions 2023-2025 - Handle XML namespace variations gracefully - Document known version differences
**Testing Requirements:** - Minimum 3 real .costyle sample files in testdata/ - Test coverage ≥85% for costyle package - All tests must pass in CI (no flaky tests)
**Code Quality:** - Pass gofmt and go vet without warnings - Follow Go naming conventions (CamelCase exports, camelCase unexported) - Document all exported functions with GoDoc comments

tests.standards:
**Testing Framework:** Go standard library testing package **Test Pattern:** Table-driven tests with filepath.Glob for file discovery (Pattern 7) **Test Coverage Target:** ≥85% for costyle package **Test File Location:** internal/formats/costyle/parse_test.go **Sample Files:** testdata/costyle/*.costyle (minimum 3 files)
**Test Categories:** 1. Valid file parsing (TestParse_ValidFile) 2. Minimal file parsing (TestParse_MinimalFile) 3. Error handling (TestParse_MalformedXML, TestParse_MissingElements, TestParse_OutOfRangeValues) 4. Parameter extraction validation (verify all fields populated correctly) 5. Performance benchmark (BenchmarkParse - target <100ms)
tests.ideas:
**AC-1 Tests:** - TestParse_ValidFile: Parse complete .costyle with all parameters, verify UniversalRecipe fields - TestParse_CoreAdjustments: Verify exposure, contrast, saturation, temperature, tint, clarity extracted correctly - TestParse_ColorBalance: Verify shadows/midtones/highlights hue/saturation extracted correctly - TestParse_MissingOptionalFields: Verify parser handles missing optional parameters with zero values - TestParse_XMLStructureValidation: Verify XML structure validation works (required elements present)
**AC-2 Tests:** - TestParse_ParameterScaling: Verify Capture One ranges mapped correctly to UniversalRecipe ranges - TestParse_MetadataPreservation: Verify style name/author preserved in Metadata map - TestParse_UnmappableParameters: Verify unmappable parameters stored in Metadata map or skipped gracefully - TestParse_SourceFormat: Verify UniversalRecipe.SourceFormat set to "costyle"
**AC-3 Tests:** - TestParse_MalformedXML: Verify error returned for invalid XML syntax - TestParse_MissingRDFElement: Verify error for missing RDF element - TestParse_MissingDescriptionElement: Verify error for missing Description element - TestParse_OutOfRangeExposure: Verify out-of-range exposure value clamped or error returned - TestParse_OutOfRangeContrast: Verify out-of-range contrast value clamped or error returned
**AC-4 Tests:** - TestParse (table-driven): Test with all .costyle samples in testdata/costyle/ - TestParse_Coverage: Verify test coverage ≥85% with go test -cover - BenchmarkParse: Verify parse performance <100ms
